en: A: Is Lituk at home, please?
She’s at home, please come in.
A: Is Ciwas at home, please?

ab: Ungat hini, niqan kari su hug?
ch: B:她不在，請問你有什麼事?
en: B: She’s not here, what can I do for you?
B: Who is it?

ab: Baki, yaku Ribix wah, rwahi rhngun su hug?
en: A: Grandpa, I’m Ribix, please open the door.
B: Who is it?

ab: Ukan, yaku o Iming, miyah ku miing sunan jita hmrapas da.
en: A:Ukan, I’m Iming, I’ve come to play with you.
A: Long time no see.

ab: Kiya o, lmnglung ku bi sunan, iyah ta pprngaw da.
ch: B:是啊!我很想念你。快來聊天吧!
en: B:Yeah! I miss you so much. Come on, let’s chat!
B: Please sit down and have some tea.
A: Thank you.
B: Please have some tea.

ab: Wa! tayal malu mahan ucia namu.
en: A:Your tea is delicious.
B: Let’s eat fruit!

ab: Kiya, suyang bi qtaan ka hiyi pnegalang dnii.
ch: B:好喔!這些水果看起來很棒。
en: A: Yes! These fruits look great.

ab: Malu uqun ka hiyi pnegalang hug?
en: B: How is the fruit?
A:Yes, it’s really delicious.

ab: Mnhdu mhapuy uqun gbiyan ka bubu da, iyah mkan nhari!
ch: A:媽媽煮好晚餐了，快來吃吧!
en: B: Mom has cooked dinner, come and eat!
A: Okay, I’ll go wash my hands.

ab: Ququ mkan, aji su seejiq isil ka isu.
ch: A:盡量吃喝，你又不是外人。
en: B: Try to eat and drink as much as possible, you’re not an outsider.

ab: Lala bi uqan mu da, mtngi ku bi da.
en: A: I ate a lot, I’m full.
B: Eat more, don’t be polite.
A:Well, it’s delicious.

ab: Mha ku da, tqita ta pxal duri.
ch: A:我要離開了，下次再來看你。
en: A: I’m leaving, I’ll see you next time.
B: Okay, goodbye.

ab: Keeman bi da, mha ku sapah da.
en: A: It’s late, I’m going home.
B:Come again next time!
B: Walk slowly and carefully.

ab: Iq, niqan jiyax su do o iyah tghuy sapah duri.
en: A: Okay, come to my house sometime.
